entities.name: Information Standstill
entities.context: Pattern where AI moves words between locations without human consumption, decoupling processing from understanding

entities.name: Ghost Activity
entities.context: Computational work providing illusion of progress while actual knowledge gap remains unchanged

entities.name: Attention Economy
entities.context: Economic framework where human attention is the scarce resource; its failure manifests in Information Standstill

entities.name: Understanding Outcomes
entities.context: Design principle that systems should optimize for actual human comprehension and behavior change

entities.name: Processing Throughput
entities.context: Anti-pattern of optimizing for volume of processed data rather than human understanding

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company, cited as example where intelligence should update user mental models

entities.name: N5
entities.context: System referenced alongside Careerspan for applying understanding-outcomes principle

relationships.context: Ghost activity is a manifestation of Information Standstill pattern
Information Standstill emerges from attention economy failure—processing scales but human bandwidth is fixed
Contrasting design philosophies; V advocates for the former over the latter
Should ensure generated intelligence actually updates user mental models
